text:
Hyuga (ヒュウガ, Hyūga) is one of five personal guards for Prince Tyson. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 400 

Appearance

Hyuga has dark hair parted to his right and wears rectangular frame glasses. He wears the usual black suit and tie of a bodyguard.

Personality

In his roleplaying as a legendary tutor, Hyuga has a confident yet modest demeanor. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

In Tyson's quarters, Hyuga modestly introduces himself as a legendary tutor capable of teaching even an incredibly dumb person to the point they are able to gain a guaranteed admission into any elite school. After the rest of Tyson's bodyguards introduce themselves, Giuliano realizes that they are acting out the characters Tyson likes. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Hyuga was possibly introduced in Chapter 375 (the second character from the right). Himoncé, Madwig, and the unnamed guard can be clearly seen. It is possible that both Hyuga and Anzel's designs were altered for various reasons (e.g., because of their roleplaying for Tyson). Note the similarity of the character's eyes, eyebrows, and the direction that their hair is parted.
